testcase.name: test_sell_custom_token_still_works
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iteration28_balance_sync_bugfix.py:45: in setup assert login_resp.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {login_resp.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":"Troppe richieste. Riprova tra poco.","retry_after":29} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_sell_balance_persists_after_refetch
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iteration28_balance_sync_bugfix.py:417: in setup assert login_resp.status_code == 200 E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
